description: Fix three distinct logic errors in the 'EcommerceBackend' project located at ~/eclipse-workspace/EcommerceBackend/ to ensure all unit tests in OrderServiceTest.java pass. The OrderService class requires the following corrections: ensure orders over $500 receive a 5% discount, orders of exactly $100.00 receive free shipping, and tax for 'NJ' (New Jersey) is calculated correctly. Do not modify the test file OrderServiceTest.java; all fixes must be implemented within the service class.
